title: convolvulus scammonia
intro: Convolvulus scammonia, also known as Scammony, is a plant species in the Convolvulaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant's roots have been used for their medicinal properties, which include being a strong purgative and laxative, used to treat constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Convolvulus scammonia include relief from indigestion, bloating, and other digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Convolvulus scammonia is often prepared as a powder or infusion for oral consumption, or used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
